headline: Reflecting On HVAC and Water Systems Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT)
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) and the best and worst performers in the hvac and water systems industry.

headline: Mirion Technologies (MIR) Moves 5.4% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Mirion Technologies (MIR) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
